transform.filter: datum.country !== 'NATO Total' && datum.country !== 'NATO Europe and Canada'

transform.calculate:
datum.country === 'United States' 
              ? 'United States' : indexof(["Norway","Sweden","Finland","Estonia","Latvia","Lithuania","Poland","Romania"], datum.country) !== -1 || datum.country == "NATO East Flank Average"
              ? 'East Flank'    : 'Other NATO members'
